# User Journey Mapping Template

Use this template to map the end-to-end experience a user has when accomplishing a goal. Fill in all sections. Leave no section blank — use `N/A` if a section does not apply.

---

## Journey Overview

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Journey Name** | `<descriptive name>` |
| **Persona** | `<persona name and role>` |
| **User Goal** | `<what the user is trying to accomplish>` |
| **Entry Point** | `<how the user arrives — direct link, navigation, notification, search>` |
| **Success Outcome** | `<measurable result when the journey succeeds>` |
| **Owner** | `<team or designer name>` |
| **Last Updated** | `YYYY-MM-DD` |

---

## Persona Summary

| Attribute | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Name** | `<persona name>` |
| **Role / Type** | `<e.g., new user, power user, admin, guest>` |
| **Goals** | `<primary goals relevant to this journey>` |
| **Pain Points** | `<known frustrations or barriers>` |
| **Tech Comfort** | `<low / medium / high>` |
| **Accessibility Needs** | `<e.g., screen reader, keyboard-only, low vision, none identified>` |

---

## Journey Steps

For each step in the journey, document what the user does, thinks, and feels.

### Step 1: `<Step Name>`

| Attribute | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Action** | `<what the user does>` |
| **Touchpoint** | `<where this happens — page, modal, notification, email>` |
| **User Thought** | `<what the user is thinking at this moment>` |
| **Emotion** | `<frustrated / neutral / confident / delighted>` |
| **Pain Points** | `<barriers or confusion at this step>` |
| **Opportunities** | `<design improvements to consider>` |

### Step 2: `<Step Name>`

| Attribute | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Action** | `<what the user does>` |
| **Touchpoint** | `<where this happens>` |
| **User Thought** | `<what the user is thinking>` |
| **Emotion** | `<emotional state>` |
| **Pain Points** | `<barriers>` |
| **Opportunities** | `<improvements>` |

### Step N: `<Step Name>`

_Copy the step block above for each additional step in the journey._

---

## Error & Recovery Paths

Document what happens when things go wrong.

| Error Scenario | Trigger | User Sees | Recovery Path | Severity |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `<e.g., invalid input>` | `<what causes it>` | `<error message or state>` | `<how the user recovers>` | Critical / Major / Minor |
| `<e.g., timeout>` | `<what causes it>` | `<error message or state>` | `<how the user recovers>` | Critical / Major / Minor |

---

## Emotional Arc

Map the user's emotional state across the journey to identify high-friction moments.

```
Step 1    Step 2    Step 3    Step 4    Step 5
neutral   confused  frustrated  relieved  satisfied
```

_Replace with actual steps and emotions from the journey._

---

## Metrics & Success Criteria

| Metric | Target | How to Measure |
|---|---|---|
| **Task completion rate** | `>= ___%` | `<analytics event or test observation>` |
| **Time to complete** | `<= ___ seconds` | `<timer from entry to success>` |
| **Error rate** | `<= ___%` | `<count of error-path entries / total attempts>` |
| **User satisfaction** | `>= ___/5` | `<post-task survey or NPS>` |
| **Drop-off rate** | `<= ___%` | `<funnel analysis by step>` |

---

## Opportunities & Recommendations

| Priority | Opportunity | Impact | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| P0 | `<critical fix or improvement>` | High | `<low / medium / high>` |
| P1 | `<important improvement>` | Medium | `<low / medium / high>` |
| P2 | `<nice-to-have enhancement>` | Low | `<low / medium / high>` |
